auth.loginDesc: Enter your credentials to access your terminal.
auth.signupDesc: Create an account to start your hacking journey.

landing.heroDesc: Your personal AI mentor for ethical hacking and defensive security. Learn faster with personalized roadmaps, interactive quizzes, and intelligent document summarization.
landing.coreFeaturesDesc: Everything you need to go from absolute beginner to cybersecurity professional, all powered by advanced AI.

chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
chat.desc: Ask any cybersecurity question. Get clear, beginner-friendly explanations with practical examples.

roadmap.title: Smart Roadmaps
roadmap.desc: Tell the AI your goals (e.g., "Become a Penetration Tester") and get a step-by-step learning path.

quiz.title: Quiz Generator
quiz.desc: Test your knowledge instantly. The AI generates contextual quizzes based on what you are learning.

pdf.title: PDF Summarizer
pdf.desc: Upload long security whitepapers or textbooks and get concise, easy-to-read summaries instantly.

scenarios.title: Practical Scenarios
scenarios.desc: Learn through simulated examples of real-world attacks and how to defend against them.

updated.title: Always Updated
updated.desc: Our AI is constantly learning about the latest threats and vulnerabilities in the industry.

landing.howItWorksDesc: Start your learning journey in just a few simple steps.

1.title: Create Account
1.desc: Sign up for free and access your personal dashboard.

2.title: Set Your Goal
2.desc: Tell the AI what you want to achieve in cybersecurity.

3.title: Follow Roadmap
3.desc: Learn step-by-step with tailored modules and resources.

4.title: Test Knowledge
4.desc: Take AI-generated quizzes to solidify your understanding.

landing.ctaDesc: Join CyberLearn AI today and accelerate your cybersecurity career with the power of artificial intelligence.
landing.footer: © {{year}} CyberLearn AI. Empowering the next generation of security professionals.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is your learning progress for today.
dashboard.emptyActivity: Activity feed will be populated as you complete quizzes and chat with AI...

quiz.title: Quiz Generator
quiz.subtitle: Test your knowledge with AI-generated quizzes.

summarizer.title: PDF / Text Summarizer
summarizer.subtitle: Paste your long cybersecurity articles or materials here to get a quick, beginner-friendly summary.
summarizer.fetchError: Failed to generate summary. Make sure the backend is running.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Your personal tutor for cybersecurity concepts.
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask about SQL Injection, XSS, Phishing...
aiAssistant.defaultGreeting: Hello! I am CyberLearn AI. What cybersecurity topic would you like to learn today?
aiAssistant.fetchError: Sorry, I couldn't connect to the backend server or database.

roadmap.title: Roadmap Generator
roadmap.subtitle: Get a personalized learning path based on your goals.
